memoryArtifacts.headline: My Maternal 25th. Great Grandfather, William de Lindsay, Lord of Ercildoun
memoryArtifacts.description:
Name: William de Lindsay, Lord of Ercildoun
Birth: about 1106 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England

Note: Folkingham is an early Saxon place name and appears in the Domesday survey of 1086 as Folching …

zh.Rouen, Haute Normandy, France: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧
zh.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Lindsay於大約1112年出生在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆時，他的父親Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln33歲，母親Maud de Penthièvre26歲。他和Alice Montgomery of Lancaster至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1147年在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。

zh-hans.Rouen, Haute Normandy, France: 法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧
zh-hans.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Lindsay于大约1112年出生在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆时，他的父亲Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln33岁，母亲Maud de Penthièvre26岁。他和Alice Montgomery of Lancaster至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1147年在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Lindsay was born about 1112, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, was 33 and his mother, Maud de Penthièvre, was 26. He had at least 1 son with Alice Montgomery of Lancaster. He died about 1147, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Lindsay est né environ 1112, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Maud de Penthièvre, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Alice Montgomery of Lancaster. Il est décédé environ 1147, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Lindsay um 1112 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln 33 und seine Mutter Maud de Penthièvre 26. Er hatte mit Alice Montgomery of Lancaster mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1147 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Lindsay è nato il circa 1112 nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Penthièvre, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Alice Montgomery of Lancaster. Morì circa 1147, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.Rouen, Haute Normandy, France: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウン
ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Lindsayが約1112年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムで生まれた時，父Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincolnは33歳，母Maud de Penthièvreは26歳であった。彼はAlice Montgomery of Lancasterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1147年に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Lindsay(이)가 대략 1112년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Penthièvre(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Alice Montgomery of Lancaster(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1147년 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1112–about 1147: tany ho any amin'ny 1112–tany ho any amin'ny 1147

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Lindsay nasceu aproximadamente 1112, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Penthièvre, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Alice Montgomery of Lancaster. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1147, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Lindsay родился около 1112 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Penthièvre, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alice Montgomery of Lancaster. Он умер около 1147 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия.

sm.about 1112–about 1147: e tusa o le 1112–e tusa o le 1147

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Lindsay nació aproximadamente 1112, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Maud de Penthièvre, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Alice Montgomery of Lancaster. Murió aproximadamente 1147, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
